## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX and Altimeter's portfolio companies for AI-focused content marketing and product marketing support.](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content marketing, focusing on technical depth, daily publishing, and SEO/GEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Pauline identified two portfolio companies (Workado and Solo.io) as potential fits for GrowthX's services](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Next steps involve Pauline introducing GrowthX to key decision-makers at both companies](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Service Offering

  - [End-to-end partner for content marketing, powered by internal AI platform](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Services include SEO/GEO strategy, daily content publishing, CMS management, and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Focus on scaling quality content production (aim: daily publishing)](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Expertise in technical content for AI, cybersecurity, and developer-focused companies](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Two-phase engagement: Strategy Sprint followed by ongoing content production](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Emphasis on accuracy and personalization, leveraging AI workflows and expert review](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

### Ideal Client Profile

  - [Companies with clear vision on ICP and competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Ability to move quickly and publish daily without extensive review cycles](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content and thought leadership tied to SEO/GEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [Not limited by company stage, but seed-stage companies may see longer time to results](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Technical depth is a strength, but overly technical review processes can be a bottleneck](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Portfolio Companies of Interest

1.  Workado
    
      - [B2B-focused automation platform, more enterprise-oriented than Zapier](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
      - [In the $5-10 million ARR range](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [GrowthX sees as a good fit, no direct conflict with current clients](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)

2.  Solo.io
    
      - [Offers gateway product (competing with Kong) and K-Agent for Kubernetes](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [$30-50 million ARR range](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [Targeting platform engineers with AI-focused products](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [Struggling to find AI-savvy product marketers](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)

### GrowthX's Track Record

  - [Successful engagements with technical clients like Town, Abnormal Security, Augment Code](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Experience with companies in cybersecurity, AI coding tools, and data infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Demonstrated results: 2x traffic growth for Augment Code in 3-4 months](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pauline to introduce GrowthX to Workado's SVP of Growth and CEO](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Pauline to introduce GrowthX to Solo.io's CEO](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Tyler to keep Marcel (GrowthX CEO) in the loop on these potential engagements](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Pauline may follow up via email with any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/2J4sxCVUsbX_3B39kVqxd23sXSjzSg-z?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
